concepts.notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vereinbarung. This branch models the verb vereinbaren only in the sense of agreeing on or settling a concrete point, date, or condition together.

Advanced family expansion around agreement and obligation language. This branch models verbindlich only in the binding, official, or obligatory sense, not the interpersonal sense of polite or obliging behavior.
Advanced family expansion around agreement and negotiation language. This branch models Verhandlung only in the sense of negotiation or talks, not the courtroom-trial sense.
Advanced family expansion around negotiation language. This branch models verhandeln only in the negotiation sense of discussing terms or conditions, not the courtroom sense of trying a case.

Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models leisten only in the sense of accomplishing, carrying out, or producing significant output. The afford sense in sich etwas leisten and other branches stay separate.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-voraussetzung. This branch models voraussetzen only in the precondition or requirement sense, not in the sense of assuming or taking something for granted.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models zusammenhängen in the abstract sense of being connected or related.

Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vorgehen and concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models nachvollziehen only in the abstract sense of following or understanding reasoning, motives, or logic, not in the sense of physically tracing something.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-herausforderung. This branch models herausfordern in the sense of demanding a strong response, effort, or ability from a person, team, or system.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-herausforderung. This branch models herausfordernd in the sense of being demanding, difficult, and requiring real effort.
Advanced communication expansion. This branch models Missverständnis as a misunderstanding caused by different interpretations, incomplete information, or unclear wording.
Advanced communication expansion. This branch models missverstehen in the sense of understanding a message, intention, or situation incorrectly.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-eindruck. This branch models beeindrucken in the sense of making a strong positive impression through quality, ability, presence, or result.
Advanced communication expansion around explanation and misunderstanding. This branch models klarstellen in the sense of making something clear, explicit, or no longer open to confusion.
Advanced communication expansion around clarity. This branch models eindeutig in the sense of being clear, unambiguous, and not open to different interpretations.
Advanced evaluation expansion around concept-b1-bewerten. This branch models einschätzen in the sense of judging or estimating something based on experience, information, or observation.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-ueberzeugen. This branch models überzeugend in the sense of being persuasive because the reasoning, evidence, or presentation is strong.

Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-verantwortung and concept-b1-verantwortlich. This branch models verantwortungsvoll in the sense of acting with care, seriousness, and awareness of consequences.

Advanced reliability expansion connected to high-performance and responsible-behavior language. This branch models zuverlässig in the sense of being dependable and consistently working or acting as expected.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad strong, stable, and not easily damaged sense for people, materials, devices, or systems; not the military sense and not the food or flavor sense. CEFR set editorially to B2 on 2026-04-17.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the able-to-withstand-pressure sense for people, teams, systems, or materials. The data or evidence sense of belastbar remains intentionally excluded here to avoid overlap with reliable or verifiable language such as zuverlässig. CEFR set editorially to B2 on 2026-04-17.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad vulnerable sense for people, positions, or systems that can be hurt, attacked, or damaged easily. CEFR set editorially to B2 on 2026-04-17.

examples.sentence: She gained new skills during the course.
The company purchased a new office complex.
Sie hat während des Kurses neue Fähigkeiten erworben.
Die Firma hat ein neues Gebäude erworben.
Ha acquisito nuove competenze durante il corso.
L'azienda ha acquisito un nuovo edificio.
In dieser Woche arbeiten wir von zu Hause.
In questo periodo lavoro da casa.
These days I work from home.
Nach dem Gespräch steht der Termin für nächste Woche fest.
Dopo il colloquio, la data per la settimana prossima è ormai fissata.
After the meeting, the date for next week is now fixed.
Ab Montag gilt der Plan für alle Teams offiziell.
Da lunedì il piano vale ufficialmente per tutti i team.
From Monday onward, the plan officially applies to every team.
Die Gespräche über den Vertrag dauern schon den ganzen Morgen.
I colloqui sul contratto vanno avanti già da tutta la mattina.
The talks about the contract have already lasted all morning.
Beide Seiten sprechen mehrere Stunden über die neuen Bedingungen.
Le due parti parlano per ore delle nuove condizioni.
The two sides talk for hours about the new terms.
Trotz wenig Zeit schafft das kleine Team in kurzer Zeit sehr viel.
Nonostante il poco tempo, il piccolo team ottiene molto in poche ore.
Despite the limited time, the small team gets a lot done in just a few hours.
Die Aufgabe verlangt bereits sichere Grundkenntnisse.
Il compito richiede già conoscenze di base sicure.
The task already calls for solid basic knowledge.
Die beiden Zahlen stehen enger miteinander in Verbindung, als es zuerst scheint.
I due numeri sono più collegati tra loro di quanto sembri all'inizio.
The two figures are more closely linked than they first appear.
Nach wenigen Minuten wird seine Argumentation fuer alle klar.
Dopo pochi minuti, il suo ragionamento diventa chiaro a tutti.
After a few minutes, his line of reasoning becomes clear to everyone.
Die neue Rolle verlangt dem ganzen Team sehr viel ab.
Il nuovo ruolo mette davvero alla prova tutto il team.
The new role demands a great deal from the whole team.
Der Kurs ist schwer, aber gerade deshalb besonders interessant.
Il corso è difficile, ma proprio per questo molto interessante.
The course is difficult, but that is exactly what makes it interesting.
Nach der Nachricht dachten beide Seiten zuerst an ganz verschiedene Dinge.
Dopo il messaggio, le due parti avevano inizialmente idee del tutto diverse.
After the message, the two sides first had completely different ideas in mind.
Ohne den ganzen Satz deutet man die Aussage schnell falsch.
Senza la frase completa, si interpreta facilmente male il senso.
Without the full sentence, the meaning is easy to interpret wrongly.
Seine ruhige und sichere Praesentation laesst viele im Raum staunen.
La sua presentazione calma e sicura colpisce molte persone nella sala.
His calm and confident presentation makes many people in the room take notice.
Zu Beginn erklaert sie ihren Standpunkt noch einmal ganz deutlich.
All'inizio ripete il suo punto di vista in modo molto chiaro.
At the start, she restates her position very clearly.
Die Zahlen zeigen in diesem Fall nur eine klare Richtung.
In questo caso i numeri mostrano una sola direzione chiara.
In this case, the figures point in only one clear direction.
Noch vor dem Treffen versucht sie, die Lage realistisch zu bewerten.
Ihr Vorschlag wirkt durch die klaren Zahlen besonders glaubhaft.
La sua proposta appare particolarmente credibile grazie ai dati chiari.
Her proposal seems especially credible because the numbers are so clear.
Mit vertraulichen Daten geht sie immer sehr umsichtig um.
Con i dati riservati si comporta sempre con molta prudenza.
She always handles confidential data with great care.
Auch unter Zeitdruck liefert das Team konstant gute Ergebnisse.
Anche sotto pressione, il team produce risultati buoni con continuità.
Even under pressure, the team keeps producing good results consistently.
Prima dell'incontro prova a farsi un'idea realistica della situazione.
Before the meeting, she tries to form a realistic picture of the situation.
Die Konstruktion haelt auch starken Wind ohne Probleme aus.
La struttura regge bene anche con vento forte.
The structure holds up well even in strong wind.
Auch nach mehreren schwierigen Wochen bleibt das Team ruhig und handlungsfaehig.
Anche dopo diverse settimane difficili, il team resta calmo e operativo.
Even after several difficult weeks, the team stays calm and effective.
Ohne rechtliche Absicherung ist das kleine Unternehmen in einem Konflikt leicht anzugreifen.
Senza tutele legali, la piccola impresa puo essere colpita facilmente in un conflitto.
Without legal protection, a small business can be hit hard in a conflict.
Die Konstruktion hält auch starken Wind ohne Probleme aus.
Auch nach mehreren schwierigen Wochen bleibt das Team ruhig und handlungsfähig.
Seine Rede hat alle im Publikum wirklich mitgerissen.
Her performance left the entire audience speechless.
La sua prestazione ha lasciato il pubblico senza parole.
Sie war völlig verblüfft von dem unerwarteten Angebot.
He was completely taken aback by the unexpected offer.
Era completamente sbalordita dall'offerta inaspettata.
Das Ergebnis entsprach leider nicht unseren Erwartungen.
The result unfortunately did not meet our expectations.
Il risultato purtroppo non ha soddisfatto le nostre aspettative.
Die Kinder waren traurig, weil das Konzert abgesagt worden war.
The children were sad because the concert had been cancelled.
I bambini erano tristi perché il concerto era stato annullato.
Es war eine unerwartete Wendung in der Geschichte.
It was an unexpected twist in the story.
È stato un colpo di scena inaspettato nella storia.
Die Absage der Veranstaltung hat viele Menschen sehr traurig gemacht.
The cancellation of the event made many people very sad.
La cancellazione della manifestazione ha rattristato molte persone.
Ihr Engagement für die Gemeinschaft verdient höchste Anerkennung.
Her commitment to the community deserves the highest recognition.
Il suo impegno per la comunità merita il massimo riconoscimento.
Das Gebäude fiel sofort durch sein ungewöhnliches Design auf.
The building immediately stood out for its unusual design.
Lo stabile si distingueva immediatamente per il suo design insolito.
Nicht alle Daten sind für diese Analyse von Bedeutung.
Not all the data is important for this analysis.
Non tutti i dati sono significativi per questa analisi.
Eine gute Kommunikation ist für das Funktionieren eines Teams unbedingt notwendig.
Good communication is absolutely necessary for a team to work well.
Una buona comunicazione è assolutamente necessaria per il funzionamento di un gruppo.
Die Entdeckung hat die Wissenschaft sehr beeinflusst.
The discovery had a major influence on science.
La scoperta ha avuto una grande influenza sulla scienza.
Die Kosten sind in den letzten Jahren deutlich gestiegen.
The costs have risen markedly over the last few years.
I costi sono aumentati in modo marcato negli ultimi anni.
Bei einer Bewertung sollte man immer sachlich vorgehen.
When making an assessment, one should always proceed on the basis of facts.
Nella valutazione bisogna sempre procedere in modo imparziale.
Ob etwas schön ist, hängt oft vom persönlichen Geschmack ab.
Whether something is beautiful often depends on personal taste.
Se qualcosa è bello dipende spesso dal gusto personale.
Respekt ist ein zentrales Prinzip für gutes Zusammenleben.
Respect is a core principle for living well together.
Il rispetto è un principio centrale per una buona convivenza.
Das Thema wird unter Experten intensiv diskutiert.
The topic is being intensely debated among experts.
Il tema è oggetto di intenso dibattito tra gli esperti.
Es gab keine bedeutenden Veränderungen seit dem letzten Treffen.
There were no significant changes since the last meeting.
Non ci sono stati cambiamenti significativi dall'ultimo incontro.
Die Anweisung war so klar formuliert, dass keine Fragen offen blieben.
The instruction was so clearly worded that no questions remained open.
L'istruzione era formulata così chiaramente che non rimanevano domande aperte.
Die Frage war so formuliert, dass man sie auf verschiedene Weisen verstehen konnte.
The question was phrased in such a way that it could be understood in different ways.
La domanda era formulata in modo tale da poter essere interpretata in vari modi.
Er gab eine unklare Antwort, ohne konkrete Details zu nennen.
He gave an unclear answer without mentioning any specific details.
Ha dato una risposta poco chiara senza citare dettagli specifici.
Er hat klar gesagt, dass er an dem Meeting nicht teilnehmen möchte.
He clearly stated that he did not wish to attend the meeting.
Ha dichiarato chiaramente che non desiderava partecipare alla riunione.
Seine Aussage konnte man auf verschiedene Weisen deuten.
His statement could be interpreted in various ways.
La sua dichiarazione poteva essere interpretata in vari modi.
Bitte nennen Sie genaue Beispiele, um Ihren Standpunkt zu verdeutlichen.
Please give specific examples to illustrate your point.
Si prega di fornire esempi specifici per illustrare il proprio punto di vista.
Das Konzept ist schwer zu verstehen, weil es keine greifbaren Beispiele gibt.
The concept is hard to grasp because there are no tangible examples.
Il concetto è difficile da capire perché non ci sono esempi tangibili.
Es war klar zu sehen, dass das Projekt nicht rechtzeitig fertig sein würde.
It was clear to see that the project would not be finished on time.
Era chiaro che il progetto non sarebbe stato completato in tempo.
Nach langen Verhandlungen haben sie eine Lösung gefunden, mit der beide zufrieden sind.
After long negotiations they found a solution that satisfied both sides.
Dopo lunghe trattative hanno trovato una soluzione che soddisfaceva entrambe le parti.
Das Tragen eines Helms ist beim Fahrradfahren in vielen Ländern Pflicht.
Wearing a helmet when cycling is compulsory in many countries.
In molti paesi esistono norme precise per la sicurezza stradale.
Alle Mitglieder haben dem neuen Vorschlag ihre Zustimmung gegeben.
All members gave their approval to the new proposal.
Tutti i membri hanno dato la loro approvazione alla nuova proposta.
Sie hat seine Behauptung mit klaren Fakten entkräftet.
She countered his assertion with clear facts.
Ha confutato la sua affermazione con fatti chiari.
Bitte teilen Sie uns mit, ob Sie am nächsten Treffen teilnehmen werden.
Please let us know whether you will attend the next meeting.
Si prega di farci sapere se parteciperete al prossimo incontro.
Nach schwierigen Gesprächen haben die beiden Seiten doch noch eine Lösung gefunden.
After difficult talks the two sides eventually found a solution.
Dopo difficili colloqui le due parti hanno alla fine trovato una soluzione.
Die Förderung wird nur gewährt, wenn bestimmte Voraussetzungen erfüllt sind.
The grant is only awarded if certain requirements are met.
Il contributo viene concesso solo se vengono soddisfatti determinati requisiti.
Sobald wir seine Bestätigung haben, können wir mit dem Projekt beginnen.
Once we have his confirmation, we can start the project.
Non appena avremo la sua conferma, potremo iniziare il progetto.
Die Stelle erfordert sehr gute Sprachkenntnisse.
The position requires very good language skills.
La posizione richiede ottime competenze linguistiche.
Beide Seiten haben im Verhandlungsprozess etwas nachgegeben.
Both sides gave something up in the negotiation process.
Entrambe le parti hanno ceduto qualcosa nel processo di negoziazione.
Die Erwartungen waren so hoch, dass viele Mitarbeiter ausgebrannt waren.
The expectations were so high that many employees burned out.
Le aspettative erano così alte che molti dipendenti si sono esauriti.
Viele Menschen fühlen sich bei zu vielen Aufgaben überfordert.
Many people find it hard to cope when demands and deadlines pile up.
Molte persone si sentono sopraffatte durante i periodi di tensione.
Die langen Arbeitszeiten haben einen großen Einfluss auf das Wohlbefinden.
The long working hours have a great impact on well-being.
Le lunghe ore di lavoro hanno un grande impatto sul benessere.
Als er die Nachricht hörte, konnte er vor Emotion kaum sprechen.
When he heard the news, he could barely speak from emotion.
Quando ha sentito la notizia, riusciva a malapena a parlare per l'emozione.
Es ist nicht leicht, dem inneren Drang nachzugeben und einfach aufzuhören.
It was hard to hold out against the temptation to simply give up.
Era difficile opporsi alla tentazione di mollare tutto.
Nur durch harte Arbeit über viele Jahre hat sie ihre Ziele erreicht.
Only through hard work over many years did she reach her goals.
Solo grazie al duro lavoro di molti anni ha raggiunto i suoi obiettivi.
Auch wenn es schwierig wird, ist es wichtig, nicht aufzugeben.
Even when things get difficult, it is important not to give up.
Anche quando le cose si fanno difficili, è importante non mollare.
Das Projekt ist trotz großer Anstrengungen nicht erfolgreich gewesen.
The project was not successful despite great efforts.
Il progetto non ha avuto successo nonostante i grandi sforzi.
Zu viele Aufgaben gleichzeitig können sehr anstrengend sein.
Too many tasks at the same time can be very exhausting.
Troppe attività contemporaneamente possono essere molto faticose.
Trotz des unerwarteten Problems konnte das Team weitermachen.
Despite the unexpected problem, the team was able to continue.
Nonostante l'imprevisto, il gruppo ha potuto andare avanti.
Mit Beweisen lässt sich klar zeigen, dass die Maßnahmen gewirkt haben.
Evidence clearly shows that the measures have worked.
Le prove dimostrano chiaramente che le misure hanno funzionato.
Die Entscheidung war angesichts der Umstände gut zu begründen.
The decision was well-founded given the circumstances.
La decisione era ben fondata date le circostanze.
Bevor man eine wichtige Entscheidung trifft, sollte man alle Möglichkeiten prüfen.
Before making an important decision, one should examine all options.
Prima di prendere una decisione importante, bisogna esaminare tutte le possibilità.
Bevor Sie das Dokument einreichen, kontrollieren Sie bitte alle Angaben.
Before submitting the document, please check all the information.
Prima di presentare il documento, controllare tutte le informazioni.
Die genauen Termine werden in der nächsten Sitzung endgültig beschlossen.
The exact dates will be definitively decided at the next meeting.
Le date esatte saranno definitivamente decise nella prossima riunione.
Die neue Software macht die tägliche Arbeit viel einfacher.
The new software makes the daily work much easier.
Il nuovo software rende il lavoro quotidiano molto più facile.
Die Regel ist so klar formuliert, dass es keine Missverständnisse geben kann.
The rule is worded so clearly that there can be no misunderstandings.
La regola è formulata in modo così chiaro che non possono esserci incomprensioni.
Ihre These wird durch mehrere unabhängige Studien gestützt.
Her thesis is supported by several independent studies.
La sua tesi è supportata da diversi studi indipendenti.
Der Bericht betont besonders die positiven Ergebnisse der Studie.
The report particularly emphasizes the positive results of the study.
Il rapporto sottolinea in particolare i risultati positivi dello studio.
Am Ende der Präsentation hat er noch einmal die wichtigsten Punkte dargestellt.
At the end of the presentation he presented the main points once more.
Alla fine della presentazione ha esposto nuovamente i punti principali.
Die Forscher haben die gesammelten Daten genau untersucht.
The researchers examined the collected data in detail.
I ricercatori hanno esaminato in dettaglio i dati raccolti.
Die Hypothese wird durch mehrere unabhängige Studien gestützt.
The hypothesis is supported by several independent studies.
L'ipotesi è supportata da diversi studi indipendenti.
Er ist wohl krank.
Probabilmente è malato.
He is probably sick.

"Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,"
Ein typisches Anredeformular für geschäftliche Briefe.
Gentile Signor Bianchi,

"Dear Sir or Madam,"
A common salutation used in professional correspondence.
Ich verstehe nur Bahnhof
Mentre parlavano velocemente, non capivo nulla.
Die Rettung der Verletzten war eine dringende Notwendigkeit.
Rispettare le norme del codice stradale è una assoluta necessità.
The necessity of regular exercise for maintaining health is well-documented.
I am sorry, I have no idea what you are talking about
Ha notato una sfumatura nel tono di voce.
She was faced with a difficult decision between two unpleasant options.
Die Subtilität des Geschmacks ist beeindruckend.
La sottigliezza del sapore è impressionante.
The subtlety of the flavor is impressive.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A polite way of greeting someone.
Ein kurzer höflicher Text am Anfang eines Briefes oder einer Nachricht.
Un modo cortese di iniziare una lettera o un messaggio.
Refers to the present period of time.
Bezieht sich auf den aktuellen Zeitraum.
Indica il periodo presente.
Used to say that you do not understand anything being said.
Wird verwendet, um auszudrücken, dass man nichts versteht.
Usato per dire che non si capisce nulla di ciò che viene detto.
a requirement that cannot be avoided or ignored
Etwas, das zwingend noetig ist.
Qualcosa che e indispensabile o strettamente necessario.
To get something, especially through effort or purchase.
Etwas erhalten, insbesondere durch Anstrengung oder Kauf.
Ottenere qualcosa, specialmente attraverso sforzo o acquisto.
Mit jemandem gemeinsam einen Termin, eine Regel oder eine Bedingung festlegen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um das gemeinsame Festlegen oder Absprechen eines konkreten Punkts.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Stabilire insieme con qualcuno una data, una regola o una condizione concreta.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui indica l'accordarsi su un punto preciso, non una trattativa lunga o complessa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To settle or fix a date, rule, or condition together with someone.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers agreeing on a specific point, date, or condition.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Offiziell geltend oder so festgelegt, dass man sich daran halten muss.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von bindend oder verpflichtend, nicht die Bedeutung höflich oder zuvorkommend.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Ufficialmente valido o stabilito in modo tale da dover essere rispettato.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di obbligatorio o impegnativo sul piano formale.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Officially valid or fixed in a way that has to be respected.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the binding or obligatory sense is modeled here.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Ein Gespraech oder eine Reihe von Gespraechen, in denen Bedingungen, Preise oder Entscheidungen ausgehandelt werden.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von Verhandlung als Gespraech oder Negotiation, nicht Gerichtsverhandlung.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Una discussione o una serie di discussioni in cui si cercano di definire condizioni, prezzi o decisioni.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di negoziazione, non di udienza o processo.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A discussion or series of discussions in which conditions, prices, or decisions are worked out.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the negotiation or talks sense is modeled here, not the courtroom-trial sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit einer anderen Seite ueber Bedingungen, Interessen oder Entscheidungen sprechen, um zu einer Loesung zu kommen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur im Sinn von Bedingungen oder Interessen besprechen, nicht einen Fall vor Gericht behandeln.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Discutere con un'altra parte condizioni, interessi o decisioni per arrivare a un'intesa.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di trattare o discutere condizioni per trovare un accordo.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To discuss terms, interests, or decisions with another side in order to reach an agreement.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers discussing terms to reach an agreement.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit Einsatz etwas schaffen, erreichen oder als Ergebnis hervorbringen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur im Sinn von etwas erreichen oder zustande bringen, nicht im Sinn von sich etwas leisten = bezahlen koennen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Riuscire a ottenere o portare a termine qualcosa con impegno e lavoro.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di ottenere o compiere qualcosa, non nel senso economico di potersi permettere qualcosa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To achieve, carry out, or produce something through effort.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the achieve or carry out sense is modeled here, not the afford sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Als notwendige Bedingung verlangen oder als vorhanden benoetigen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von etwas als Bedingung verlangen, nicht annehmen oder stillschweigend erwarten.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Esigere come condizione necessaria o presupporre come gia presente per poter procedere.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di richiedere come prerequisito, non di supporre mentalmente qualcosa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To demand as a necessary condition or to need as already present.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the precondition sense is modeled here, not the sense of assuming something mentally.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Inhaltlich oder ursachlich miteinander verbunden sein.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die abstrakte Verbindung zwischen Fakten, Ereignissen oder Ideen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Essere connesso a livello di contenuto, causa o significato.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso astratto di fatti, idee o sviluppi che sono legati tra loro.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To be linked in content, cause, or meaning.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the abstract relation between facts, ideas, or events is modeled here.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Gedanklich verstehen, wie etwas begruendet ist oder warum etwas so geschieht.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von Argumentation, Motivation oder Logik verstehen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Capire mentalmente il ragionamento, la logica o il motivo di qualcosa.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di riuscire a seguire un'argomentazione o una motivazione.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To understand the reasoning, logic, or motivation behind something.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the abstract reasoning sense is modeled here, not physical following.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Von jemandem oder etwas viel Einsatz, Faehigkeit oder eine starke Reaktion verlangen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier im Sinn von fordern oder stark beanspruchen, nicht im engen Sinn einer formellen Herausforderung zum Duell.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Richiedere molto impegno, capacità o una forte reazione a qualcuno o qualcosa.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso ampio di mettere alla prova, non solo di lanciare una sfida formale.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To demand a lot of effort, ability, or response from someone or something.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers the broader sense of testing or demanding a lot, not only a formal challenge.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Schwierig und anspruchsvoll, sodass echter Einsatz noetig ist.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann fuer Aufgaben, Situationen, Phasen oder Ziele verwendet werden.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Difficile e richiedente, tanto da domandare un vero impegno.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a compiti, situazioni, periodi o obiettivi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Difficult and demanding in a way that requires real effort.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This can describe tasks, situations, phases, or goals.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Eine Situation, in der Menschen etwas unterschiedlich verstehen und dadurch ein falsches Bild entsteht.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch bei unklarer Formulierung, fehlendem Kontext oder unterschiedlichen Erwartungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Una situazione in cui persone diverse capiscono la stessa cosa in modi differenti e nasce un'idea sbagliata.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico quando mancano contesto o chiarezza.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A situation in which people understand something differently and a wrong impression results.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical when wording is unclear, context is missing, or expectations differ.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas falsch verstehen oder einer Aussage, Person oder Situation einen unzutreffenden Sinn geben.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um inhaltliches Fehlverstehen, nicht um blosses Ueberhoeren.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Capire in modo sbagliato il senso di una frase, di un'intenzione o di una situazione.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di interpretare male, non semplicemente di non sentire bene.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To understand the meaning of a message, intention, or situation incorrectly.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers interpreting something wrongly, not merely failing to hear it.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Bei jemandem durch Qualitaet, Faehigkeit, Auftreten oder Leistung einen starken positiven Eindruck hinterlassen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um einen spuerbaren positiven Eindruck, nicht um blosses Gefallen oder Zustimmung.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Lasciare una forte impressione positiva grazie a qualità, capacità, presenza o risultati.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di fare impressione in positivo, non nel senso fisico di colpire.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To leave a strong positive impression through quality, ability, presence, or results.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers making a noticeable positive impression, not simply being liked.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas so erklaeren oder formulieren, dass kein Missverstaendnis mehr bleibt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um ausdrueckliches Klarwerdenlassen einer Aussage, Position oder Situation.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Spiegare o formulare qualcosa in modo tale da non lasciare più spazio a fraintendimenti.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di rendere esplicita una posizione, una frase o una situazione.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To explain or formulate something so that no misunderstanding remains.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers making a statement, position, or situation explicit and clear.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So klar, dass nur eine Interpretation oder Schlussfolgerung moeglich ist.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Aussagen, Belege, Ergebnisse oder Signale.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Così chiaro da permettere una sola interpretazione o conclusione.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per dichiarazioni, prove, risultati o segnali.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So clear that only one interpretation or conclusion is possible.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for statements, evidence, results, or signals.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas auf Grundlage von Erfahrung, Informationen oder Beobachtung beurteilen oder abschaetzen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um ein urteilendes Einschaetzen, nicht um exaktes Messen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Giudicare o stimare qualcosa sulla base di esperienza, informazioni o osservazione.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di farsi una valutazione ragionata, non di misurare con precisione.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To judge or estimate something on the basis of experience, information, or observation.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers reasoned assessment, not exact measurement.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So stark begruendet oder praesentiert, dass es andere glaubhaft mitnimmt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Argumente, Auftritte, Belege oder Konzepte.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Presentato o motivato in modo tale da risultare credibile e persuasivo.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per argomenti, prove, presentazioni o proposte.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Presented or reasoned in a way that seems credible and persuasive.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for arguments, evidence, proposals, or presentations.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So handelnd, dass Folgen ernst genommen werden und sorgfaeltig mit einer Aufgabe oder Rolle umgegangen wird.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um die Art zu handeln, nicht nur darum, fuer etwas offiziell zustaendig zu sein.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Che agisce tenendo seriamente conto delle conseguenze e trattando con cura un compito o un ruolo.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso del modo di agire, non solo dell'essere formalmente incaricato.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Acting in a way that takes consequences seriously and treats a role or task with care.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers responsible conduct, not only formal responsibility or being in charge.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So, dass man sich darauf verlassen kann, weil es konstant gut funktioniert oder geschieht.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann fuer Menschen, Informationen, Systeme oder Prozesse gelten.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Tale da potervi fare affidamento, perché funziona o agisce bene in modo costante.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Può riferirsi a persone, informazioni, sistemi o processi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Dependable because it works or acts well in a steady and consistent way.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This can apply to people, information, systems, or processes.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Kräftig, stabil und nicht leicht zu beschädigen oder aus dem Gleichgewicht zu bringen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann Menschen, Materialien, Geräte oder Systeme beschreiben; hier nicht im militärischen Sinn.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Forte, solido e non facile da danneggiare o far cedere.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a persone, strutture, dispositivi o sistemi; qui non nel senso militare.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Strong, solid, and not easily damaged or made to fail.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Can describe people, structures, devices, or systems; not the military sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Fähig, Druck, Beanspruchung oder Belastung gut auszuhalten.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann Menschen, Teams, Systeme oder Materialien beschreiben; hier nicht im Sinn von belastbaren Zahlen oder Daten.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Capace di reggere bene pressione, sforzo o richieste pesanti.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a persone, team, sistemi o materiali; qui non nel senso di dati affidabili o verificabili.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Able to cope well with pressure, strain, or heavy demands.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Can describe people, teams, systems, or materials; not the evidence or verifiable-data sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Anfällig für Schaden oder Angriffe.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann Menschen, Beziehungen, Positionen oder Systeme beschreiben.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Facile da colpire, danneggiare o ferire sul piano personale o pratico.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a persone, relazioni, posizioni o sistemi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Easy to hurt, damage, or attack emotionally, physically, or strategically.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Can describe people, relationships, positions, or systems.
